_comment: Canonical POST /v1/bands contract fixture for issue #83. Backend tests parse `request`/`response` against BandsUploadRequestSchema/BandsUploadResponseSchema (packages/shared-contracts/src/api/bands.ts). iOS tests (apps/ios/KairosTests/BandUploadClientTests.swift) embed an identical literal copy of both objects — keep both in sync by hand if this file changes.
